final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire [1:0] address,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire clock,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] unused_memory [0:3]; // 4 x 4-bit unused_memory

    always @(posedge clock) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            unused_memory[address] <= data_in; // Write data to selected address
        end
        data_out <= unused_memory[address]; // Read data from selected address
    end
endmodule
